task_completion.description: Verify the Odoo Recruitment application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface is visible with 'Recruitment' highlighted in the main menu, breadcrumbs, or the recruitment pipeline Kanban board is displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify the new stage is named 'Technical Assessment'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Technical Assessment' is visible either as a new column header in the Kanban pipeline view or inside the 'Stage Name' field in the stage configuration form.

task_completion.description: Verify the stage description contains 'standardized technical evaluation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the stage configuration form (often under a 'Tooltips' or 'Requirements' or 'Description' field), the text 'standardized technical evaluation' is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the new stage is positioned after 'First Interview'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Kanban pipeline view or a list view of stages, 'Technical Assessment' appears to the right of (or sequentially below) the 'First Interview' stage.

task_completion.description: Verify the new stage is positioned before 'Second Interview'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Kanban pipeline view or a list view of stages, 'Technical Assessment' appears to the left of (or sequentially above) the 'Second Interview' stage.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Odoo UI elements (menus, Kanban boards, forms) are present, and the browser URL bar indicates a genuine Odoo instance.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs 'Technical Assessment' and 'standardized technical evaluation' are entered into Odoo form fields or UI elements, not a standalone text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Stage Name: 'Technical Assessment'. Target Description: 'standardized technical evaluation' (or containing 'technical evaluation'). Preceding Stage: 'First Interview'. Succeeding Stage: 'Second Interview'. Note that 'First Interview' and 'Second Interview' are default Odoo stages, while 'Technical Assessment' is the custom stage the agent must create and position between them.
